title: The Show.
content:
The show is not the show,
    But they that go.
    Menagerie to me
    My neighbor be.
    Fair play --
    Both went to see.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "The Show.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
